notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela hit by pitch. Marcelo Mayer to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Masataka Yoshida pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Masataka Yoshida singles on a fly ball to left fielder Daniel Johnson.

notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela grounds into a double play, shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Isaac Paredes. Marcelo Mayer out at 2nd. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela grounds into a double play, shortstop Carlos Correa to first baseman Isaac Paredes. Marcelo Mayer out at 2nd. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Shay Whitcomb pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Shay Whitcomb called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras singles on a ground ball to pitcher Bryan Abreu. Willson Contreras to 2nd. Willson Contreras advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Bryan Abreu.
